'''kashufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngawha|ngawha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngawha|ngawha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kashufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæshifith|kæshifith]] || [[word:kæshifij|kæshifij]] || [[word:kæshifish|kæshifish]] || [[word:kæshifi|kæshifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashushufuth|kashushufuth]] || [[word:kashushufuj|kashushufuj]] || [[word:kashushufush|kashushufush]] || [[word:kashushufu|kashushufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashufuth|kashufuth]] || [[word:kashufuj|kashufuj]] || [[word:kashufush|kashufush]] || [[word:kashufu|kashufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashuffuth|kashuffuth]] || [[word:kashuffuj|kashuffuj]] || [[word:kashuffush|kashuffush]] || [[word:kashuffuf|kashuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kashufuthu|kashufuthu]] || [[word:kashufuju|kashufuju]] || [[word:kashufushu|kashufushu]] || [[word:kashufuku|kashufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kashufuth|kashufuth]] || [[word:kashufuj|kashufuj]] || [[word:kashufush|kashufush]] || [[word:kashufu|kashufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kashufuthul|kashufuthul]] || [[word:kashufujul|kashufujul]] || [[word:kashufushul|kashufushul]] || [[word:kashufukul|kashufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kashufuthuthu|kashufuthuthu]] || [[word:kashufujuju|kashufujuju]] || [[word:kashufushushu|kashufushushu]] || [[word:kashufuku|kashufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kashufuthun|kashufuthun]] || [[word:kashufujun|kashufujun]] || [[word:kashufushun|kashufushun]] || [[word:kashufukun|kashufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kashufuthuoro|kashufuthuoro]] || [[word:kashufujuoro|kashufujuoro]] || [[word:kashufushuoro|kashufushuoro]] || [[word:kashufukuoro|kashufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
